title: VAT Digital Economy Guide
summary: Sets non-binding NBR views on VAT rules and procedures for digital economy supplies, including electronically supplied services, online content, platforms, digital advertising, gaming and cross-border digital services.

theme_notes.digital_economy.einvoicing_digital_tax: NBR guidance on VAT treatment of Bahrain digital economy supplies.
theme_notes.online_content.online_advertising_influe: VAT guidance for digital advertising and digital economy services.
theme_notes.online_content.gaming_esports: VAT guidance for digital economy services including online gaming.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Value Added Tax Law and VAT Executive Regulations
